result.stdout:
Usage: simpl [command]

Simpllist.Wrapless.Compiler

Commands:
  build      Complies and creates the SIMPL+ wrapper from your C# source code
  compile    Complies the generated Simpl Plus Wrapper

Options:
  -h, --help    Show help message
  --version     Show version

commands.payload:
Usage: simpl [command]

Simpllist.Wrapless.Compiler

Commands:
  build      Complies and creates the SIMPL+ wrapper from your C# source code
  compile    Complies the generated Simpl Plus Wrapper

Options:
  -h, --help    Show help message
  --version     Show version

result.stdout:
Usage: simpl build [--path <path>] [--destination <output>] [--help]

Complies and creates the SIMPL+ wrapper from your C# source code

Options:
  -p, --path <path>             the assembly path (Required)
  -o, --destination <output>    the output path for the compiled SIMPL+ wrapper
  -h, --help                    Show help message
